name: Chipotle Chile Slaw
recipeInstructions:
If using dried chipotles, rehydrate by soaking in hot water until softened.
Using a mortar and pestle or food processor, mash or puree the chilies with garlic clove. Blend into mayonnaise. Stir mixture into shredded cabbage, seasoning to taste with salt, pepper, and a few drops of lemon juice if desired. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
